subject: feat: extract pwaHelpers.js, add 57 unit tests, complete ThemeContext + test TODO items
body:
Extract pure PWA functions to utils/pwaHelpers.js:
- detectBrowser, wasJustUpdated, trackInstallEvent, isStandalone,
  CHROMIUM_BROWSERS, BROWSER_DISPLAY_NAMES extracted from hook files
  into standalone module with no browser-only imports (debugLog,
  virtual:pwa-register). Both hooks now import from pwaHelpers.

New test files (57 tests, 76 → 133 total):
- pwaHelpers.test.js: detectBrowser with 13 UA variants (iOS CriOS/
  FxiOS/EdgiOS, Samsung, Opera, Vivaldi, Arc, etc.), wasJustUpdated
  (within/outside 30s, missing key, storage error), trackInstallEvent
  (write, append, cap at 50, storage error)
- layouts.test.js: toRgba (rgb/rgba input, opacity scaling, non-rgb
  passthrough), toTransparentRgba
- platforms.test.js: structure validation (required fields, positive
  dimensions, valid recommendedFormat), unique IDs, category coverage,
  flat export count, getAspectRatio, findFormat, findPlatformGroup
- themes.test.js: neutralColors integrity, getNeutralColor lookup,
  presetThemes structure (unique IDs, valid hex, variant completeness,
  light/dark primary differentiation)

Export toRgba/toTransparentRgba from layouts.js for testing.

Move React Context for theme values (TODO #2) to HISTORY as completed.
Update unit test coverage item (TODO #3) with new counts and remaining.
Update CLAUDE.md architecture with useTheme.js and pwaHelpers.js.

Tags: testing, pwa, refactor, state, themes
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: test-coverage
Semver: minor
